## Summary

Describe motivation and what changed. Link related issue(s) if available.

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change included (add migration notes below)

## Migration Notes

If this PR changes behavior or contracts, describe how users should adapt.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests updated or added for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] `zig build test-main` passes locally
- [ ] Relevant `zig build test-...` suite(s) pass locally

## Test Commands

List commands executed and short outcomes (for example `zig build test-main` - pass).
